title: agropyron rigidum subsp. elongatum
intro: Agropyron rigidum subsp. elongatum, also known as tall wheat grass or elongated green wheat grass, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities, as well as its ability to stimulate the immune system. The health benefits of Agropyron rigidum subsp. elongatum include reducing oxidative stress, improving digestion, and supporting overall well-being. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and grinding the leaves into a powder or making tea infusions, which can be consumed for its medicinal benefits.
